label: Email Redaction
description: Anonymized email-like inputs measuring detector recall on valid addresses and precision on nearby clean text.

cases.label: Missing top-level domain is ignored
cases.input: Draft alias jane.smith@hospital should remain visible.
cases.expected: Draft alias jane.smith@hospital should remain visible.

cases.label: Sentence without email remains unchanged
cases.input: Routing note for the care team remains unchanged.
cases.expected: Routing note for the care team remains unchanged.
